overall.description: Third-person gameplay footage from The Witcher 3 showing Geralt of Rivia exiting a building and exploring a medieval harbor town. The character walks and runs along cobblestone quays, briefly enters a residential yard, and ends on a wooden dock overlooking the water.

events.description: Geralt walks through doorway exiting the building to outdoor harbor

agents.ego_description: walking through a dimly lit stone cellar toward the exit doorway

entered.detail: rough-hewn stone block walls of the cellar interior
tall wooden shelving units holding various pottery and supplies
clay pots and jars arranged on the shelves
wooden door frame leading to bright exterior

segments.scene_description: The scene opens in a dimly lit stone storage cellar. Wooden shelves lined with ceramic jars line the right wall as Geralt walks toward a doorway revealing bright daylight outside.

scene_state.functional_zone: medieval harbor promenade with sailing ships

events.description: exits building into bright outdoor harbor area with ships and canopies
character transitions from walking to running along the quay

agents.ego_description: running along the harbor walkway, passing under canvas canopies and between pedestrians

notable_agents.action: laborer carrying wooden crate on shoulder walking ahead
guard in red uniform with halberd standing watch

entered.detail: fabric canopy stretched between wooden poles providing partial shade
large wooden sailing vessel with furled sails docked at harbor
wooden planked walkway and docks along the water
tall stone bell tower rising above the harbor buildings
irregular stone paving stones of the harbor walkway

segments.scene_description: Emerging from the building, the scene opens into a bustling medieval harbor. Geralt runs along cobblestone quays lined with canvas awnings, passing dockworkers and guards. Sailing ships are moored to the left while a stone church tower dominates the skyline ahead.

scene_state.functional_zone: small residential yard with timber house

events.description: enters fenced yard area with timber-framed house
exits yard back to harbor walkway

agents.ego_description: walking into a small fenced yard, approaching a timber-framed house, then turning to exit

notable_agents.action: man sitting on wooden bench outside the house

entered.detail: traditional half-timbered medieval house with white plaster and dark beams
low wooden fence enclosing the small yard
grassy ground within the fenced residential area
stack of cut logs and firewood beside the house

segments.scene_description: Geralt ducks into a small enclosed yard with a timber-framed house. A man sits on a bench beside a wood pile as the character briefly explores the grassy area before exiting back to the harbor.

events.description: returns to open harbor walkway from enclosed yard

agents.ego_description: running along the cobblestone waterfront path beside the canal, passing other townspeople

notable_agents.action: shirtless man running past the camera
guard in red coat walking with halberd

entered.detail: calm water of the harbor canal reflecting the sky
arched stone bridge spanning the canal ahead
rough wooden fence railing along the water edge

segments.scene_description: Back on the waterfront, Geralt runs along a cobblestone path beside a canal. A stone bridge arches over the water ahead while wooden railings line the path. Other townspeople and guards walk along the busy harbor route.

scene_state.functional_zone: wooden fishing dock extending over canal water

events.description: steps down from stone quay onto wooden dock planks over water
stops at end of dock to look at the water

agents.ego_description: walking onto a wooden dock over the water, approaching a fisherman at the end

notable_agents.action: fisherman standing at dock edge holding fishing rod over the water

entered.detail: weathered wooden planks of the dock surface extending over water
arched underside of the stone bridge visible from the dock level

segments.scene_description: Geralt steps onto a wooden dock extending over the canal water. The planks creak as he approaches a fisherman standing at the edge with a rod. The stone bridge arches overhead while sailing ships are visible in the distance across the water.

merged_segments.scene_description: The shot follows a continuous camera movement that transitions from the dim confines of a stone cellar into the bright, expansive atmosphere of a bustling medieval harbor. It begins in a dimly lit storage room lined with ceramic jars, moving toward a doorway that reveals a sudden burst of daylight. As Geralt emerges, the scene opens into a wide quay where he runs past canvas awnings and moored sailing ships toward a distant church tower, before briefly ducking into a quiet, grassy yard featuring a timber-framed house. The camera then follows him back onto the cobblestone waterfront, passing under a stone bridge and alongside a canal filled with townspeople and guards. Finally, the movement leads onto a wooden dock extending over the water, ending beside a fisherman with the harbor's ships visible in the distance.
